data.title: ElevenEs completes 1st closing of Series B backed by Caterpillar Venture Capital Inc. To build 1GWh LFP Battery Cell Mega Factory in Feb 2026.
data.description: A groundbreaking ceremony will mark the commencement of the construction of the ElevenEs 1GWh lithium iron phosphate (LFP) battery cell mega factory in Subotica, Serbia, and Luxembourg in February 2026. This facility, with a capacity of 1 gigawatt-hour (GWh), will position the region as a key player in battery production.

data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DK) declares quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share, payable on March 9, 2026.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, shared that their Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share. This dividend will be distributed on March 9, 2026, to shareholders recorded on March 2, 2026. Delek US Holdings, Inc. operates in the petroleum refining, logistics, and pipelines sector, boasting diversified downstream energy assets. The company primarily manages refineries in Tyler and Big Spring, Texas.
